purpose: Sonnet 5 direct-comparison rerun of the 200-decision n=800 4-seed baseline. Referenced from docs/icaif-2026/paper-skeleton.md §5.1.
framework_claim_dependence: none — framework is model-agnostic; any calibration deltas apply symmetrically
note: Empty by design pre-launch. Populate with `node scripts/icaif-batch-eval.mjs --n 200 --seed <s> --model claude-sonnet-5-YYYYMMDD --out benchmark/icaif-2026/sonnet-5-followup.jsonl` before v2.1.0 release.
